content.problemStatement:
What will be the output of the following C++ program?

```cpp
#include 
using namespace std;

int main() {
    short shortValue = 5;      // Short value
    int intValue = shortValue;  // Implicit conversion from short to int

    cout << "Short value: " << shortValue << endl;
    cout << "Converted int value: " << intValue << endl;

    return 0;
}
```

Options: A  
```default
Short value: 5  
Converted int value: 5  
```

Options: B
```default
Short value: 5  
Converted int value: 5.0  
```

Options: c   
```default
Short value: 5  
Converted int value: 5.00  
```

Options: D    
```default
Compilation error due to type mismatch
```
